data.title: Update CLAUDE.md brainstorm references for non-epic support
data.description:
Update CLAUDE.md to reflect that /dso:brainstorm now accepts any ticket type.

Changes needed:
1. Update the brainstorm entry in the Quick Reference table to mention non-epic support
2. Update any brainstorm description text to note convert-to-epic and enrich-in-place options

TDD: test-exempt: static config — CLAUDE.md is agent instruction documentation with no executable behavior. Criterion: static assets only (unit exemption criterion 3).

## File Impact
- MODIFY: CLAUDE.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md reflects brainstorm accepts any ticket type
  Verify: grep -qi 'brainstorm.*any.*ticket\|brainstorm.*non-epic\|brainstorm.*story.*task.*bug' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions convert-to-epic option
  Verify: grep -qi 'convert.*epic' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions enrich-in-place option
  Verify: grep -qi 'enrich.*in.*place\|enrich.*place' CLAUDE.md
